title: Audit Director
description:
Company Overview / Employee Value Proposition

We are a Chartered Accounting Firm established since 1973 and have a very good client base. Our clients are from a wide range of industries, from manufacturers, diamond and jewelry wholesalers, shipping, merchants, investment holding companies, biotech companies, oil and bio fuel, coffee bean suppliers, chains of restaurants and cafes, finance companies and fund managers, IT hardware and software, construction and engineering, paper processing companies etc. both local and international. We also provide financial due diligence services in addition to audits.

Job Summary

Manage a portfolio of SME audit clients by leading audit engagements in compliance with firm policies and professional standards, resolving technical issues, and fostering client relationships to support business growth.

Responsibilities

  • Lead audit engagements for SME clients, ensuring compliance with the Firm's policies, procedures, and approved professional standards to deliver high-quality assurance services
  • Direct audit teams to resolve technical matters effectively, ensuring accurate and timely completion of audit work
  • Develop and maintain strong client relationships to understand their business needs and identify opportunities for new business development
  • Apply analytical thinking and initiative to assess audit risks and provide insightful recommendations to clients
  • Communicate audit findings clearly and professionally to clients and internal stakeholders to support informed decision-making

Required competencies and certifications

  • Hold a recognised degree in Accountancy or equivalent professional accounting qualifications
  • Demonstrate relevant experience delivering audit and assurance services in large or mid-tier international public accounting firms
  • Possess or be ready to apply for a practicing certificate

Preferred competencies and qualifications

  • Exhibit strong technical skills in auditing standards and accounting principles
  • Apply initiative and analytical skills to enhance audit quality and client service
  • Communicate effectively with clients and team members to build productive working relationships
